novatech.title: Shanghai Port 12-Day Delay
novatech.details: Typhoon Vera has caused structural damage to two loading cranes at Shanghai Yangshan Port, creating a 12-day backlog affecting 340+ vessels. MCU shipments in transit are affected.

novatech.title: Taiwan Strait Export Controls
novatech.details: New semiconductor export licensing requirements introduced for TSMC-sourced chips. Approval process adds 3–6 weeks to lead times.

novatech.title: Primary MCU Supplier Fire
novatech.details: A warehouse fire at Renesas Electronics' Busan facility destroyed an estimated 40% of Q2 MCU production capacity. Force majeure notice issued.

novatech.title: US West Coast Port Strike
novatech.details: ILWU workers at LA/Long Beach ports have voted to strike beginning March 10. Affects ~40% of inbound container capacity.

freshchain.title: California Drought — Produce Shortage
freshchain.details: Extended drought conditions have reduced lettuce and spinach yields by 35% across Salinas Valley. Key packaging substrate suppliers also affected.

freshchain.title: Refrigerated Fleet Breakdown
freshchain.details: Mechanical failure has taken 12 refrigerated trucks offline, impacting cold-chain delivery capacity to Southwest distribution centers by 30%.

freshchain.title: Cold-Chain Packaging Shortage
freshchain.details: Primary packaging supplier Sealed Air Corp reports a 3-week production delay due to a resin shortage, affecting modified-atmosphere packaging supply.

steelwright.title: Ukraine Steel Export Ban
steelwright.details: Ukraine has suspended steel exports for 90 days to prioritize domestic reconstruction. Affects specialty alloy pricing globally.

steelwright.title: ArcelorMittal Blast Furnace Shutdown
steelwright.details: Unplanned maintenance shutdown at ArcelorMittal Burns Harbor has reduced specialty alloy output by 20% for the next 6 weeks.

steelwright.title: Rail Network Disruption — Midwest
steelwright.details: BNSF rail derailment near Chicago has caused 4–5 day delays on steel coil shipments from Cleveland to assembly customers.
